title: neottia pudica
intro: Neottia pudica, also known as the grass pink orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neottia pudica are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Neottia pudica typically involve drying and processing the plant into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
